options.content: Use health endpoints for gateway/orchestrator/ingestion services.
Paper positions, fills, and risk state.

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol, quantity, avg_entry_price, realized_pnl, updated_at FROM paper_positions ORDER BY ABS(quantity) DESC, symbol ASC LIMIT 100;
SELECT created_at, symbol, side, price, quantity, fee, order_id FROM paper_fills ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100;

SELECT now() AS ts, COALESCE((SELECT max_drawdown_pct FROM paper_performance_rollups WHERE interval='daily' ORDER BY bucket_start DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS latest_max_drawdown_pct, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(ABS(quantity * COALESCE(avg_entry_price, 0))) FROM paper_positions), 0) AS gross_exposure_est_usd, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(ABS(quantity * COALESCE(avg_entry_price, 0))) FROM paper_positions), 0) AS top_position_est_usd;
SELECT MIN(ts) AS first_point_ts, MAX(ts) AS last_point_ts, COUNT(*) AS equity_points, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(ts) - MIN(ts))) / 86400.0 AS observed_days FROM paper_equity_curve;
